base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of cammy — a character from 1991 street fighter ii. Cammy White — Super SF2 New Challenger. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Cammy White — Super SF2 New Challenger; Cannon Spike + Spiral Arrow
